content:
The given code snippet is a Java implementation of a class named "ClassA" that extends the java.io.FilterReader. The FilterReader is a class in Java's IO package which allows you to read from an underlying input source and filter out certain characters or bytes.

Here, we have overridden the read method to implement our own logic for reading data from the underlying reader. In this case, we are simply calling the superclass's read method and returning its result.

The class is named "sambo" as per your request. The sambo class is a subclass of ClassA which inherits all properties and methods from ClassA while also adding or overriding specific functionality.
